overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a gold convertible through a futuristic desert city. The vehicle travels from a residential commercial street through an intersection, then onto a highway leading toward mountainous desert terrain with the city skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential commercial street with palm trees

agents.ego_description: driving steadily down a two-lane street lined with palm trees and small buildings, approaching a major intersection

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the street
small single-story buildings with weathered facades
tall commercial building with large blue and white signage reading 24/7 STORE
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a gold convertible driving down a sunlit urban street. Palm trees line both sides of the road, with small residential buildings and power lines visible. The vehicle approaches a major intersection where a large 24/7 Store building dominates the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with traffic control

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop at a red traffic light at the intersection
vehicle begins a wide right turn maneuver at the intersection
traffic light changes to green as the vehicle completes the turn

agents.ego_description: stopped at a red light, then executing a right turn while waiting for cross traffic to clear

notable_agents.action: orange sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: tall pole with red stop light illuminated
elevated concrete track structure for high-speed transit
multi-story structures with various signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a red light at a busy intersection, with an elevated monorail track visible on the left. After waiting for cross traffic including an orange sedan, the car executes a right turn as the light changes to green. The 24/7 Store building shifts to the left side of the frame as the vehicle changes direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street beneath elevated highway overpasses

events.description: driving under the shadow of a large concrete overpass, temporarily dimming the lighting
exiting the overpass shadow back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the commercial district, passing under multiple highway overpasses

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure casting shadows on the street below
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a commercial district characterized by massive elevated highway overpasses that create alternating patterns of shadow and sunlight. Digital billboards and neon signs adorn the buildings on the right, while the monorail track recedes into the distance on the left. The road is multi-lane with moderate traffic flow.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramp transitioning to open road

events.description: entering the highway ramp and ascending above street level
passing into the shadow of a large overpass structure, significantly darkening the scene
exiting the urban canyon with first clear view of distant mountains and city skyline

agents.ego_description: merging onto the highway ramp and accelerating up the incline, leaving the dense urban area

entered.detail: tall concrete highway dividers with metal railings
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings forming the downtown skyline
large desert mountains with rocky peaks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a highway ramp, ascending above the city streets with concrete barriers lining the sides. As it climbs, the view opens to reveal the futuristic city skyline on the left and a vast mountain range straight ahead. The lighting shifts dramatically when passing under a large overpass before emerging into bright sunlight with the desert landscape becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with desert mountain backdrop and industrial zone

events.description: overtaking a large flatbed truck on the left side of the highway
passing a large billboard featuring a face advertisement on the right side

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the open highway, overtaking slower traffic and approaching the desert mountains

notable_agents.action: large military-style flatbed truck traveling in the same direction

entered.detail: low-rise warehouse structures with corrugated metal siding
massive yellow advertisement billboard featuring a face

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle traveling on an open highway with the city skyline receding into the distance on the left and desert mountains dominating the horizon ahead. The car overtakes a large flatbed truck while passing industrial warehouses and a massive billboard on the right. The environment transitions from urban to desert industrial as the road stretches toward the mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a gold convertible travels from a sunlit residential street into a vast, industrial desert landscape. It begins by following the vehicle past palm trees and power lines toward a major intersection dominated by a 24/7 Store, where the car pauses at a red light beneath an elevated monorail track before turning right. As the vehicle enters a commercial district, the scene shifts into a rhythmic pattern of light and shadow created by massive highway overpasses and neon-lit billboards. The camera then ascends a highway ramp, passing under a final overpass that triggers a dramatic lighting shift as the view opens to reveal the futuristic city skyline on the left and a distant mountain range ahead. Finally, the environment transitions from urban to desert industrial as the car overtakes a flatbed truck and passes warehouses, leaving the city behind to head toward the open mountains.
